name: French Onion Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice onions into 1/4 inch slices.
2. Separate the sliced onions into individual rings.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, baking powder, salt, beaten egg, beer, and oil. Blend until smooth.
4. Dip onion rings into the batter to coat them well.
5. Fry the onion rings in hot oil at 375 degrees Fahrenheit until they are golden brown.
6. Drain the fried onion rings on paper towels.
